THE ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE FOR 10/21/04 IS VACATED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 12/13/04 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 12/03/04 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. ORDER SIGNED. ASBESTOS COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-20-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Christopher Andrea, Esq. for Plaintiff: Anna Toliver, as successor in interest to Charles Fountain, deceased.
Ingrid Camapne, Esq. for Defendant: QuinTech Inc.
At counsel's request, matter is taken off calendar.

ASBESTOS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Assigned To Master Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause on calendar for settlement conference. Ms. S. Babou for Brayton & Purcell appeared in behalf of Plaintiff and Ms. H. Huth appeared for Quintec. Settlement discussions obtained and the case did not settle. As a preference case with the last day of 12-15-04 the cause is assigned to Dept. 206 at 11:15 a.m. on 12-20-2004 for trial. Plaintiff's counsel to provide notice. Judge: Wallace P. Douglass; Clerk: D. Feinberg.
